name: apple-reminders
description: Connect Apple Reminders for task capture, review, organization, attachments, and safe reminder changes.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Apple Reminders tasks and attachments
interface.longDescription: Use Apple Reminders to inspect lists, sections, reminders, due dates, notes, and image attachments, then draft or apply safe task changes directly from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Summarize, organize, capture, attach images to, or safely update my Apple Reminders
